GuidePage.Title: Guidebook Component Showcase
GuidePage.Subtitle: Reference page for the standardized guidebook component system.

GuideInfoBox.Title: Role Split
GuideInfoBox.p: Use XAML-backed guide tags for structure, spacing, hierarchy, and reusable chrome. Use inline markup only for [bold]emphasis[/bold], [italic]tone[/italic], [color=#caa468]highlights[/color], and [textlink="links" link="MisfitsGuidebookTemplate"].

GuideSection.Title: Page Structure
GuideSection.p: Every page starts with a title, a one-sentence summary, and then a small number of clearly named sections.

GuideSubSection.Title: Major Sections
GuideSubSection.p: GuideSection creates the primary page rhythm and should contain the lead paragraph for that topic.

GuideSubSection.Title: Subsections
GuideSubSection.p: GuideSubSection groups procedures, tables, or tactical notes under a single idea.

GuideInfoBox.Title: Info Box
GuideInfoBox.p: Use info boxes for context, scope, and non-critical reminders.

GuideWarningBox.Title: Warning Box
GuideWarningBox.p: Use warning boxes only for hazards, irreversible choices, or common failure states.

GuideExampleBlock.Title: Example Block
GuideExampleBlock.p: Example blocks are for recommended patterns, sample workflows, or reference sequences.

GuideCodeBlock.Title: Code Block
GuideCodeBlock.p: Code blocks are for short snippets, commands, or literal authoring fragments that need visual separation.

GuideSection.Title: Lists and Inline Markup
GuideSection.p: Inline markup should stay short and local to the sentence it modifies.

ul.li: Use [bold]bold[/bold] for labels and command verbs.
Use [italic]italic[/italic] for tone, caveats, or secondary emphasis.
Use [color=#caa468]accent color[/color] sparingly for highlights inside body text.
Use [textlink="guide links" link="MisfitsGuidebookTemplate"] or [textlink="external links" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Main_Page"] inside paragraphs, not as layout elements.
